creator: christos@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to porok777 from comment #8)
Regarding the second problem you're describing, it is something I've noticed as well and been meaning to fix, but haven't really investigated it in-depth yet.

That being said, both issues are not really related to the initial bug report, which was about the lack of /dev/dsp* nodes for uaudio devices. I think it'd be best if you opened a new bug report for each of those 2 issues. The issue initially reported here is not present anymore.
